hero.subheadline: GoatedSocials is a social media marketing agency that turns scroll-stopping content, smart paid ads, and real strategy into measurable growth — so you can focus on running your business.

services.subheading: One team, every service — strategy, content, ads, and reporting working together instead of in silos.

items.title: Social Media Management
items.description: Full-service management of your profiles — posting, community engagement, and a content calendar built around your goals.

items.title: Content Creation
items.description: Scroll-stopping graphics, short-form video, and copy crafted to match your brand voice and platform trends.

items.title: Paid Ads
items.description: Data-driven ad campaigns across Meta, TikTok, and beyond — optimized continuously to lower cost and lift conversions.

items.title: Influencer Marketing
items.description: Access to a vetted network of creators, matched to your niche for partnerships that feel authentic and drive results.

items.title: Analytics & Strategy
items.description: Clear monthly reporting and a strategy that evolves with the data, so every dollar you spend works harder.

about.label: Why GoatedSocials
about.heading: We treat your brand like it's ours
about.description: GoatedSocials started with a simple idea: agencies were charging premium prices for cookie-cutter content and copy-paste strategies. We built a leaner team of strategists, creators, and media buyers who actually dig into your brand — and it shows in the results.
benefits: Dedicated strategist for every account, not a rotating cast
Transparent monthly reporting — no vanity metrics
Content built for your brand voice, not a template
Flexible month-to-month plans, no lock-in contracts
about.statYearsLabel: Years helping brands grow their social presence
